---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: 'FEATURE: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## What problem does this solve?
 
Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. (e.g. "There's no way to do X without Y.")
 
## Proposed solution
 
Describe what you'd like to happen. If you have a specific API shape, config option, or behavior in mind, include it.
 
## Alternatives considered
 
Any other approaches you considered, and why you'd prefer this one.
 
## Impact on existing behavior
 
- [ ] This is purely additive (no existing behavior changes)
- [ ] This would change existing API behavior
- [ ] This would change the on-disk storage format
If you checked either of the last two boxes, please explain the impact.
 
## Additional context
 
Anything else worth including — links, prior stuff in similar projects, etc.
